title: Skill creation turns repeated workflow into a proposal

session_turns.content: when i ask for a rust review, inspect the diff and run fmt, tests, and clippy
reusable workflow: inspect changes, run format/test/lint, report correctness risks first

prompt_markers: Create exactly one Loka skill proposal

skill.name: Rust review
skill.instructions: Inspect the requested diff, run format, tests, and lint gates, then report correctness risks first.
safety_notes: Do not run destructive git commands.
